hero.title: Simple, transparent pricing
hero.description: Choose the tier that matches your travel style. Limits and features stay synced with your account plan.

shared.upgradeHelper: Upgrade in place without starting a second subscription.
shared.manageBillingHelper: This billing state needs to be managed in Paddle.
shared.downgradeHelper: Downgrades stay managed in Paddle billing for now.
shared.canceledGraceTitle: Your plan is canceled, but access is still active.
shared.canceledGraceHelper: You keep paid access until {date}. After that, paid trips become expired and read-only until you resubscribe.
shared.canceledGraceShort: Access remains active for a limited grace period.
shared.inactiveTitle: Your paid subscription is no longer active.
shared.inactiveHelper: Resubscribe to restore paid trip access, editing, and sharing on this account.
shared.inactiveShort: Resubscribe to restore paid access on this account.

backpacker.name: Backpacker
backpacker.description: A generous free tier to start planning with confidence.

explorer.name: Explorer
explorer.description: Higher limits, longer retention, and collaboration-ready editing.

globetrotter.name: Globetrotter
globetrotter.description: Top tier with unlimited scale and no trip expiry.

anonymousLimits.title: Anonymous access limits
anonymousLimits.description: Anonymous users can keep up to {limit} active trips at a time. Each anonymous trip stays editable for {days} days, then becomes locked until account activation.
anonymousLimits.footer: Create a free account to keep your planning history and unlock tier upgrades later.

checkout.title: Review your plan before payment
checkout.description: Choose your plan, save the traveler details you want on your account, and continue in a dedicated checkout step.
checkout.summaryLead: You are preparing {tierName}. Save your account details first, then continue to Paddle's secure payment flow.
checkout.planSummaryBilling: Tax and invoices are handled during checkout through Paddle.
checkout.planSummarySupport: Payment method updates, invoices, and renewals stay managed in Paddle after purchase.
checkout.profileSaveDescription: Save the traveler details you want TravelFlow to keep before you pay.
checkout.loginTitle: Use a real account before paying
checkout.loginDescription: Your paid tier, invoices, and entitlements sync to a real TravelFlow account. Sign in or create one first, then continue here.
checkout.paymentDescription: Finish the payment below. We keep the rest of the flow on this dedicated checkout page.
checkout.paymentCompletedDescription: Paddle confirmed your checkout. Subscription sync continues in the background.
checkout.paymentSyncingMessage: We’re syncing your new plan to this account now.
checkout.paymentSyncDelayedDescription: Your payment succeeded, but TravelFlow is still waiting for the subscription state to settle. Refresh in a moment or open billing settings if this does not update soon.
checkout.paymentSyncReadyDescription: Your new tier is now active on this account.
checkout.travelerDetailsHeadline: Save the profile details you want to keep
checkout.travelerDetailsDescription: These details stay on your TravelFlow account. Billing-specific tax information stays inside Paddle.
checkout.travelerDetailsLockedDescription: These traveler details are already saved on your account. Update them only if something needs to change before payment.
checkout.travelerDetailsSavedDescription: Your checkout profile details are now up to date.
checkout.travelerDetailsPaymentReady: Secure payment is ready below. Edit these details only if something changed.
checkout.travelerDetailsAutoContinue: Secure payment opens automatically as soon as your saved details are confirmed.
checkout.profileSettingsDescription: Open full profile settings if you want to edit usernames or public profile details before paying.
checkout.errorConfig: Checkout is temporarily unavailable in the current environment. Check Paddle configuration and try again.
checkout.errorTierUnavailable: This plan is not configured in the current Paddle environment yet.
checkout.accountDescription: Sign in or create your account to keep the subscription on a real TravelFlow profile.
checkout.accountReadyDescription: This account will receive the subscription.
checkout.successDescription: Your plan is now linked to this account. Continue from the next step you actually need.
checkout.successClaimProcessing: We’re starting your trip in the background.
checkout.successClaimError: Your payment succeeded, but the saved trip could not be started automatically.
checkout.manageBillingUnavailable: Billing management is not available for this account yet.
checkout.upgradeCompletedDescription: Your subscription was updated and the new tier is syncing now.
checkout.upgradeReviewTitle: Review the updated billing total before confirming.
checkout.upgradePreviewDescription: The change applies immediately and Paddle handles the prorated adjustment.
checkout.currentPlanDescription: You already have {planName}. Use Paddle billing if you need to cancel or change payment details.
checkout.manageBillingDescription: This subscription state cannot be changed inline right now. Open Paddle billing to manage the subscription safely.

voucher.title: Apply a discount before checkout
voucher.description: Use a Paddle voucher link or enter your code here. We keep it attached when you continue to checkout.
voucher.appliedDescription: Your savings are shown on eligible paid plans and stay attached through checkout.
voucher.invalidMessage: This voucher is not available for the current paid plans.
voucher.cardSavingsMessage: Save {savings} on the first payment. Estimated checkout total: {discounted}.
voucher.checkoutSavingsMessage: Estimated checkout total: {discounted}. You save {savings} on the first payment.
